Tweet by @nyk_builderz (Nyk 🌱)
Author bio: co-founder @builderzdotdev | founder @splitlabsio | building solana + agentic systems in DeFi/trading | member @superteamDE | oss @awesome_cortex | @mcbuilderz
Text: Vibe coding isn’t the problem.
Unverified vibe coding is.

Beginners don’t usually fail at generating code —
they fail at running a reliable build → verify → recover loop.

Speed compounds only when checks are part of the workflow, not optional. https://t.co/f019ulxore
